subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-11-25
subcodes.first_line: Notwithstanding these clear texts the Shiites do not believe in the 'meeting with God'; but they say in the end of the time so many extraordinary events will transpire
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
